title: Waystones PBR
body:
This resource pack adds PBR textures to [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) !

It fits nicely with Neapik RTX placed below in the resource pack list

I recommend using [No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings)

[Waystones Emissive](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/waystones-emissive) is also available (emissive texture only, no normal map and reflections)
